ValidationRule.description: Interest Rate Index and First Rate Reset Date cannot be blank if Loan Type is "Variable"
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: And( ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Loan_Type__c,'Variable'),OR( ISNULL( leaseworks__Interest_Rate_Index__c ) , ISNULL( leaseworks__First_Rate_Reset_Date__c )))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: For 'Variable' Loan Type neither Interest Rate Index nor First Rate Reset Date can be blank. Please check and enter the missing value(s).
